nasb.text: and Nebo and Baal-meon—their names being changed—and Sibmah, and they gave other names to the cities which they built.

esv.text: Nebo, and Baal-meon (their names were changed), and Sibmah. And they gave other names to the cities that they built.

cnv.text: 尼波、巴力．免、西比瑪；又為他們修築的城市起了別的名字。

ccb.text: 尼波、巴力·免和西比玛。他们为重建的城邑起了新名字，如尼波和巴力·免。
